signal: Closeout Step 9c bug: hub bulletin was publishing ALL high-impact lugs (impact>7) regardless of type — epics, tasks, implementations, session summaries all accumulated in WAI-Hub/Signals/incoming/. Fix: added type=="signal" filter. 155 files cleared to processed.
rationale: Silent protocol error — no crash, just accumulation. Any spoke running the old closeout is polluting the hub bulletin with non-signal content every session.
